response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack engineer with a long, diverse career spanning web, mobile, and some systems programming, but his profile does not match this role's core requirement of deep, current C++ expertise for industrial automation. His hands-on C++ work is decades old and brief (NI LabWindows/CVI components, a thesis project), with most recent systems-level work in DLang rather than C++/STL. There is no evidence of MQTT, message brokers at industrial scale, IEC 62443/SDL practices, or industrial protocol experience, and his experience level far exceeds the 8-12 year target band, suggesting misalignment with the role's seniority framing.
strengths: Strong low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Sociomantic, albeit in DLang
Broad full-stack and event-driven architecture experience, including an event-driven geo-data platform he founded
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing (workshops, refactoring dojos, Selenium courses) matching the mentoring expectations
concerns: Minimal and outdated C++ experience; no evidence of modern C++/STL work in the last two decades
No industrial cybersecurity, IEC 62443, SDL, MQTT, or OT-protocol experience required for this automation-focused role
Career trajectory and stack (TypeScript/Node.js/DLang web platforms) diverge from embedded/industrial C++ development; also outside the stated 8-12 year experience profile

key_factors.factor: No industrial security (IEC 62443/SDL) or MQTT background
